extension_name.description: The display name for the extension.

extension_description.message: Converts Chinese text on web pages using OpenCC with configurable conversion presets.
extension_description.description: Description of what the extension does.

popup_enable_conversion.description: Toggle label to enable or disable text conversion.

popup_input_text.description: Label for the source language select control.

popup_output_text.description: Label for the target language select control.

popup_convert_now.description: Button text to immediately convert the active page.

popup_status_saved.description: Status suffix shown after settings are saved.

popup_status_conversion_requested.description: Status suffix shown after requesting conversion on the active tab.

popup_status_failed_load_settings.description: Error text shown when popup initialization fails.

preset_traditional_chinese_opencc.description: Preset label for OpenCC Traditional Chinese.

preset_taiwan_traditional.description: Preset label for Taiwan Traditional Chinese.

preset_hong_kong_traditional.description: Preset label for Hong Kong Traditional Chinese.

preset_taiwan_traditional_idioms.description: Preset label for Taiwan Traditional Chinese with idioms.

preset_traditional_kyujitai.description: Preset label for traditional Kyujitai Japanese.

preset_japanese_shinjitai.description: Preset label for modern Shinjitai Japanese.
